creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
Orion is a J2EE (Java 2 Enterprise Edition) compliant Application
	Server. It supports all major standards including HTTP/1.1, JSP 1.1,
	EJB 1.1, Servlet 2.2, JNDI 1.2 and others. It also offers clustering
	support and some unique auto-deployment features.

Fix: Here is the output from `shar /usr/ports/java/orion'. I have included
	the plaintext .sh file, and not the uuencoded version of the .tar.gz
	file, because the uuencoded .tar.gz file was 65 KB, while this .sh
	file is only about 46 KB :)


How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
